theme_archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Light Theme) infused with Archetype 1 Trust

HeroCaseCard.structure: Full-width card, border radius 24px, overflow hidden. Main image is absolute full size.
HeroCaseCard.overlay: LinearGradient from bottom to top using color_palette.overlay_gradient_start to overlay_gradient_end. Opacity 80% at bottom to ensure white text is highly readable.
HeroCaseCard.content: Positioned at the bottom. Includes Lawyer name, case status, next hearing date in white text.
HeroCaseCard.badge: Risk assessment badge floating at top right (e.g., 'Low Risk' in green background, rounded).

FloatingDarkPillNavigation.structure: Absolute positioned at the bottom, centered. Width around 80% of screen.
FloatingDarkPillNavigation.style: Background #111827, height 70px, border-radius 100px. Flex-direction row, justify-content space-evenly, align-items center.
FloatingDarkPillNavigation.active_state: Active icon receives a circular background of #2563EB. Icons must be white/light grey.

SuccessProbabilityRingChart.structure: SVG or Native Canvas Ring Chart. 82% filled.
SuccessProbabilityRingChart.inner_content: Large bold text '82%' centered in the ring, with 'Win Rate' below it.

CaseProgressTimeline.node_active: Solid #2563EB circle (16px) with a line connecting to next. Text is primary color.
CaseProgressTimeline.node_inactive: Border only circle (border #E5E7EB). Text is secondary color.

ChatInterface.bubble_user: Background #2563EB, Text #FFFFFF, border-top-left-radius 20, border-top-right-radius 20, border-bottom-left-radius 20, border-bottom-right-radius 4.
ChatInterface.bubble_ai: Background #FFFFFF, Text #111827, border-top-left-radius 20, border-top-right-radius 20, border-bottom-left-radius 4, border-bottom-right-radius 20. Soft shadow.
ChatInterface.input_area: White container with rounded input, send button #2563EB.

DocumentsList.structure: Row layout per item. Left icon (document outline), middle text (title & date), right action (download/view).
DocumentsList.item_container: Background #FFFFFF, border-radius 16px, padding 16px, soft shadow, margin-bottom 12px.

LawyerMarketplaceCard.structure: Row layout. Left: Lawyer avatar (80x80 rounded). Right: Details (Name, Specialization, Rating, Experience). Action button 'Consult' in Electric Blue.

testing_attributes.usage: Add testID prop to all interactive and important elements in React Native (e.g., testID='nav-home-tab').

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo application. Use 'StyleSheet' or standard React Native styles. If NativeWind is configured, you may use Tailwind classes.
Background color of the main ScrollView/View MUST be #F0F2F5 (Light Grey).

The Floating Bottom Navigation MUST be a dark pill (#111827) with rounded-full borders, positioned absolutely at the bottom with z-index. The active tab gets an Electric Blue (#2563EB) circular background behind the icon.
For the Hero Case Card, use an 'ImageBackground' or absolute positioned 'Image' with a 'LinearGradient' from expo-linear-gradient overlaid on top to ensure text readability.
The Success Probability chart should be implemented as a circular progress ring. The arc must hit exactly 82%.
Ensure all card elements use soft shadow styling (elevation: 2 on Android, shadowOpacity: 0.05 on iOS) and have a #FFFFFF background with large border radii (16px to 24px).
Implement the Chat Interface with user bubbles in Electric Blue (#2563EB) and AI bubbles in White (#FFFFFF).
DO NOT use Inter font for headings. Use Manrope for headings and Work Sans for body text.
Ensure to use testID instead of data-testid since this is React Native.
